title: rothmannia lateriflora
intro: Rothmannia lateriflora, also known as the yellow orchid or yellow rothmannia, is a flowering plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Rothmannia lateriflora include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating wounds, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of Rothmannia lateriflora can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
